title: Native CSS Nesting
description: Refactor flat CSS into native CSS nesting syntax to improve readability and reduce selector repetition
html: Home About Contact

validationRules.message: Active link should have blue background
Active link text should be white

hints.text: Native CSS nesting uses & to reference the parent selector. You can nest selectors inside their parent's rule block.
Put .main-nav-link rules inside .main-nav { }. Use & for pseudo-classes: &:hover and compound selectors: &.active.
Nest child and state selectors inside the parent using & syntax.
